name: Baked Chicken Breasts with Honey Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 Whole boneless chicken breasts, skins off or on (it's up to you), cut into half
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Place rack in center position.
Lightly coat a 2-quart casserole dish with non-stick vegetable cooking spray or a thin layer of vegetable shortening.
Pour rice into the bottom of the prepared dish, then pour broth over it.
Rinse chicken and pat dry with paper towels.
Layer chicken over the rice in the casserole dish.
Combine yogurt, honey, mustard, brown sugar, and soy sauce. Mix well.
Spread mixture evenly over the chicken.
Cover loosely with foil and bake for 40-50 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until chicken reaches safe internal temperature (no pinkness and juices run clear when tested).
Let sit for 5-10 minutes before serving if liquid is not absorbed.
